description: Core API serving vehicle inventory records to dealer-facing applications
notes: Primary data source for all dealer pricing and inventory displays

description: Manages the price stack fields on vehicle records — MSRP, dealer invoice, market adjustment, final price
notes: Responsible for writing all price_stack fields to vehicle records. Recent deployment changed field mapping logic.

description: Validates vehicle record field integrity before writes are committed
notes: Currently passing all validation checks — the corrupted values are technically valid numbers, so validation does not catch them

description: Primary RDS database for vehicle inventory records
notes: Database is healthy. Issue is in the data written to it, not the database itself.

description: API powering the dealer-facing inventory management portal
notes: Healthy — correctly serving whatever data vehicle-inventory-api returns. Downstream of the data corruption.
